unit: Unit 12: Everyday Life with Your Mac
title: Notes and Documents
drDigitalIntro: The Notes app is perfect for quick ideas, shopping lists, recipes, and anything you want to remember. Notes sync across all your Apple devices via iCloud. For longer documents — letters, reports, essays — use Pages (Apple's word processor, free) or Microsoft Word. You can create a new note by pressing Command+N in the Notes app. Notes can include text, photos, checklists, and sketches.
